input.assistantResponse:
# Release Readiness

## Decision
Ship after the migration rehearsal.

## Checklist
- [x] Backups verified
- [ ] Rehearsal completed
- [ ] Rollback owner confirmed

## Risks
The remaining risk is migration duration.

input.assistantResponse:
```mermaid
graph LR
  Web --> API
```
